channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Altra Promo Codes: Get 20% Off Plus Free Shipping
item.description: Score big savings on Altra Running shoes with up to 50% off sale styles, 20% off select models, 10% off your first order when you sign up, plus free standard delivery on every purchase.

item.title: How to watch London Marathon 2026: Free Streams & TV Channels
item.description: All the ways to watch London Marathon 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – with Sebastian Sawe and Tigst Assefa defending their titles.

item.title: Lachy Groom to back India startup Pronto at a $200M valuation, sources say
item.description: This round, should it occur, would double the house-help startup's valuation in a matter of weeks.
